note: Block-6700 banner now embeds the Monte Carlo fairness comparison (5000 blocks per scheme, seed=42, 5-miner mix sized to the live chain). V8 / V9 / V10 are all within 0.6 percent of fair hashrate share, but V10 reduces the count of E7-class relief blocks by ~22 percent (1475 vs 1811/1896 under V8/V9). The simulator script lives at scripts/relief_valve_simulator.py in this repo and the run is reproducible. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
